summary: A Fox News segment (Jesse Watters with White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt) reacting to a Supreme Court ruling allowing use of the Alien Enemies Act for rapid deportations, with inset enforcement B-roll from Houston and Aurora, CO. It is a talking-head news interview, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: KAROLINE LEAVITT | WHITE HOUSE PRESS SECRETARY; SUPREME COURT CLEARS WAY FOR RAPID DEPORTATIONS; FOX NEWS ALERT
